programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: Miley Stewart, an average teenage girl, lives a double life as a famous pop singer named Hannah Montana and constantly tries to conceal her true identity from the public.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்

మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்

విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ

டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After moving to a haunted town, Griffin and his classmate Harper discover a portal that allows them to travel through time. Together, they uncover dark secrets while encountering a restless ghost.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After moving to a haunted town, Griffin and his classmate Harper discover a portal that allows them to travel through time. Together, they uncover dark secrets while encountering a restless ghost.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie

லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Hannah Montana
हन्ना मोंटाना
ஹானா மோன்டானா
హన్నా మోంటానా
programme.desc: Miley Stewart, an average teenage girl, lives a double life as a famous pop singer named Hannah Montana and constantly tries to conceal her true identity from the public.
माइली स्टीवर्ट, एक औसत किशोरी लड़की, हन्ना मोंटाना नामक एक प्रसिद्ध पॉप गायिका के रूप में दोहरी जिंदगी जीती है और लगातार अपनी असली पहचान जनता से छिपाने की कोशिश करती है।
பிரபல பாடகியான மைலி, ஹானா மோன்டனா பெயரில் இரட்டை வாழ்க்கை வாழ்வதோடு, தனது உண்மையான அடையாளத்தை மறைக்க முயற்சிக்கிறார்.
మైలీ స్టీవర్ట్ అనే ఒక సాధారణ అమ్మాయి, హన్నా మోంటానా అనే ప్రసిద్ధ పాప్ సింగర్‌గా ద్వంద్వ జీవితాన్ని గడుపుతుంది.

गुड लक चार्ली

లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.
मैडी की ज़िंदगी तब उथल-पुथल हो जाती है जब उसकी जुड़वाँ बहन लिव, जो एक सुपरस्टार है, हाई स्कूल लौटती है। हालात और भी बदतर हो जाते हैं क्योंकि उनके माता-पिता भी एक ही स्कूल में काम करते हैं।
பள்ளிக்கு திரும்பும் லிவ்வால், மேடிக்கு குழப்பமானது, பெற்றோர்களும் அதே பள்ளியில் பணிபுரிவதால் விஷயங்கள் மேலும் மோசமானது.
సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Justin Russo must shed his mortality in order to mentor his wizard niece, Billie, and help her get her powers under control.
जस्टिन रूसो को अपनी जादूगरनी भतीजी बिली का मार्गदर्शन करने और उसकी शक्तियों को नियंत्रित करने में मदद करने के लिए अपनी नश्वरता को त्यागना होगा।
ஜஸ்டின் ருஸ்ஸோ, மந்திரவாதி மருமகள் பில்லிக்கு வழிகாட்டவும், சக்திகளை கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரவும் மரணத்தை கைவிட வேண்டும்.
మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स बिऑन्ड वेवर्ली प्लेस
விசார்ட்ஸ் பியாண்ட் வேவர்லி ப்ளேஸ்
విజర్డ్స్ బియాండ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్

మాంత్రికురాలైన తన మేనకోడలు బిల్లీకి మార్గదర్శకత్వం వహించడానికి జస్టిన్ రస్సో తన అమరత్వాన్ని వదులుకోవాలి.

programme.title: Wizards of Waverly Place
विज़र्ड्स ऑफ वेवर्ली प्लेस
விஸார்ட்ஸ் ஆஃப் வேவர்லி பிளேஸ்
విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్
programme.desc: Alex, Justin and Max Russo have descended from a long line of wizards. They must compete with each other in order to become the sole wizard of their family and hiding their abilities from the world.
एलेक्स, जस्टिन और मैक्स रूसो जादूगरों की एक लंबी परंपरा से निकले हैं। उन्हें अपने परिवार का एकमात्र जादूगर बनने और अपनी क्षमताओं को दुनिया से छिपाने के लिए एक-दूसरे से प्रतिस्पर्धा करनी होगी।
மந்திர சக்திகளையுடைய மூவர் குடும்பத்தின் ஒரே மந்திரவாதி ஆக மாற, தங்கள் திறன்களை மறைத்து ஒருவருக்கொருவர் மோத வேண்டும்.
న్యూయార్క్ లో ఉండే రుస్సోకుటుంబయజమాని మంత్రగాడుకావడంతో పిల్లలు కూడానేర్చుకుంటారు,అందులోనేర్పరికి మంత్రదండం ఇవ్వబడుతుంది.

విజార్డ్స్ ఆఫ్ వేవర్లీ ప్లేస్

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World

கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie
गुड लक चार्ली
குட் லக் சார்லி
గుడ్ లక్ చార్లీ
programme.desc: Three brothers, Teddy, Casey, and Gabe, whose parents enlist their help when they return to work after the birth of their fourth child, Charlie.
डंकन की ज़िंदगी में उथल-पुथल मचता है, जब वे अपने चौथे बच्चे, चार्ली का स्वागत करते हैं। हालाँकि, अराजकता होती है जब टेडी, पीजे और गेब अपने माता-पिता की अनुपस्थिति में चार्ली की देखभाल करते हैं।
டங்கன் தம்பதியினர் தங்கள் நான்காவது குழந்தையான சார்லியை வரவேற்கும்போது அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை தலைகீழாக மாறுகிறது.
డంకన్ కుటుంబంలో నాలుగో అమ్మాయి చార్లీ రాకతో, ఆమె పెద్దక్క టెడ్డీ తమ సాహసాలు డైరీ రాసి, కానుకగా ఇవ్వాలనుకుంటుంది.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After moving to a haunted town, Griffin and his classmate Harper discover a portal that allows them to travel through time. Together, they uncover dark secrets while encountering a restless ghost.

programme.title: Secrets of Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After moving to a haunted town, Griffin and his classmate Harper discover a portal that allows them to travel through time. Together, they uncover dark secrets while encountering a restless ghost.

సూపర్‌స్టార్ అయిన తన కవల సోదరి లివ్ పాఠశాలకు రావడం, తమ తల్లితండ్రులు కూడా అక్కడే పనిచేయడంతో మాడీ పరిస్థితి దిగజారుతుంది.

programme.title: Girl Meets World
गर्ल मीट्स वर्ल्ड
கேர்ள் மீட்ஸ் வர்ல்ட்
గర్ల్ మీట్స్ వరల్డ్
programme.desc: Middle-school student Riley Matthews faces many problems growing up but finds solace in Maya Hart, her best friend, who helps her overcome all the obstacles.

मिडिल स्कूल की छात्रा रिले मैथ्यूज को बड़े होने के दौरान कई समस्याओं का सामना करना पड़ता है, लेकिन उसे अपनी सबसे अच्छी दोस्त माया हार्ट से सांत्वना मिलती है, जो उसे बाधाओं को पार करने में मदद करती है।
ரைலி மேத்யூஸ் பல பிரச்சனைகளை எதிர்கொள்கிறார், ஆனால் அவரது சிறந்த தோழியான மாயா ஹார்ட்டிடம் ஆறுதல் காண்கிறார்.
చిన్నతనం నుండి అనేక సమస్యలు ఎదుర్కొంటున్న పాఠశాల విద్యార్థి రిలే మాథ్యూస్ కి, ఆమె ప్రాణ స్నేహితురాలు మాయా అండగా ఉంటుంది.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie
लिव एण्ड मैडी
லிவ் அண்ட் மேடி
లివ్ అండ్ మాడీ
programme.desc: Maddie's life turns chaotic when her twin sister Liv, a superstar, returns to high school. Matters get worse as their parents work for the same school.

programme.title: Boon

programme.title: The Sweeney

programme.title: BattleBots

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Find Me A Rainbow: Classic US action drama series. When a rich woman hires Thomas to find a limo driver who allegedly stole jewellery from her, he uncovers a more unusual theft. [S,AD] S6 Ep15

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Dead Again: Classic US detective drama. Theo dismisses the story of a woman claiming that a supposedly dead criminal is still alive and intends to kill her to cover his tracks. [S] S4 Ep14

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: The Barefaced Contessa: Classic drama. Harry and Ken's company is providing security for a charity auction in Derbyshire when an old flame of Ken's turns up and asks for his help. [S] S6 Ep5

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Latin Lady: Tough 1970s police drama series. A rich gynaecologist is attacked by a gang of villains who rob him of his suitcase but is puzzlingly uncooperative afterwards. [S] S4 Ep12

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Sharpe's Enemy: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Captain Sharpe is assigned the task of delivering a ransom to a horde of deserters who have taken two Englishwomen hostage. [S] S2 Ep2

programme.title: World Superbike Highlights
programme.desc: The 2026 World Superbike Championship continues with the Pirelli Portuguese Round as the 4.592km track at the Autodromo Internacional do Algarve pushes the riders to their limits. [S]

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Comedy legend Lee Mack hosts the ultimate leveller of a game show - 100 contestants will start, but who will make it to the end to try to win up to 100,000 pounds? [S,AD]

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Ricochet, Chris Jericho, Kris Statlander, Darby Allin and Claudio Castagnoli. [S]

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: American Killers: Jeremy Wade travels to one of the largest dams in the Americas on the trail of a river monster that is responsible for the mysterious disappearance of corpses. [S] S4 Ep3

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Kings of the Canvas: Richard Henwood takes a look back at the glory days of British wrestling with some classic action from the archives. [S]

programme.title: Road to 26: Croatia v Brazil
programme.desc: Croatia take on Brazil as part of the Road to 26 series of international friendlies leading into the 2026 FIFA World Cup, from the Camping World Stadium in Orlando Florida. [S]

programme.title: Boonie Bears : The Big Shrink
programme.desc: After purchasing a mysterious shrink ray machine, Vick accidentally shrinks Briar, Bramble, and himself. The tiny team must put aside their differences and embark on one big journey to restore their size and their friendship.

programme.title: Mission to the Moon
programme.desc: In the international race to the moon, the Norwegian mission is led by brilliant inventor Reodor from the village of Flaklypa. With Louis the Magpie as the brave astronaut, what could possibly go wrong? Quite a bit, actually – on the daring mission, secret passengers are discovered, hidden agendas are revealed, and nothing seems to work out the way it was planned. Louis and his friend Luca the Hedgehog are in for some surprises on their trip to the moon. The third film in the stop-motion trilogy featuring the beloved characters from the Flaklypa universe.

programme.title: Spy Cat
programme.desc: Four crazy anti-heroes, one pawsome adventure. Join special-agent Marnie and her friends as they team up and fight crime. Spoiled and innocent, chubby house cat Marnie lives a comfortable and pampered life in the Sunshine household. She has never ventured outside the family home and only knows about the real world through her favourite detective, crime TV-shows.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy Lupin manages to convince the pack elders to let him sit Howlington Academy’s entrance test. Freddy must use all his poodle wits- and his best friend Batty’s help!- to win a place at the historically wolf-only academy.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s the first day of school, and Freddy immediately comes into conflict with bully Ivan, who blackmails him into stealing the sacred moonstone! But when Batty is exposed to the moonstone, she’s turned into a human girl!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy attempts to teach Batty how to be human, while searching for a cure for her new form. A class assignment to capture the mysterious ‘Golden Horn’ and prove who the ‘alpha’ wolf is goes awry when a wilderwolf attacks!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy becomes convinced that there’s a wilderwolf at Howlington, and launches a daring investigation to prove that it’s the school accountant, Mr Sminch. Howlington gets a new teacher, the super cool and charming Ric Rawls.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids are struck down by a flea infestation, and Freddy and Batty are tasked with tracking down the mysterious Doog, keeper of the Fleaminator, the most powerful flea treatment known to dog, before they’re all expelled!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: The kids head out on their first excursion to Night Patrol HQ. Freddy gets pulled into Scarlet’s world as she gets closer to the truth about werewolves and the two bond when they get stuck in the forest while tracking a wolf.

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: It’s Howloween, and Howlington is on lockdown. But when the students stage a play that goes wrong and the lockdown is disrupted, it will be up to the kids to save the grown-ups from themselves - including Principal Pincus!

programme.title: 100% Wolf : Legend of the Moonstone
programme.desc: Freddy and Ivan have failed their runes exam and have to do it over - or they won’t be allowed to attend the Doom Wolves concert. But their study session ends up putting themselves, and the Doom Wolves, in grave danger!

programme.title: Back to the Sea
programme.desc: When little fish Kevin is swept up in a net and taken from his home in the vast oceans to the small glass fish tank of a restaurant, he must find a way to escape and make his way back home.

programme.title: Racetime
programme.desc: Frankie and Sophie challenge newcomers Zac and Charlie to an epic sled race.

programme.title: Son of Bigfoot
programme.desc: A teenage boy journeys to find his missing father only to discover that he's actually Bigfoot.

programme.title: Ozzy
programme.desc: The lovable Ozzy’s pampered life is thrown into turmoil after his family drops him at Blue Creek before their vacation. Ozzy quickly learns that Blue Creek is a dog prison and he’ll need to rely on some new friends to help him break out and get back home.

programme.title: Stardog & Turbocat
programme.desc: A loyal dog and a vigilante cat embark on a space age voyage to find their way home.

programme.title: Rally Road Racers
programme.desc: A rookie race-car driver gets the opportunity to compete against the reigning champion. With help from a former driver, he must overcome treacherous terrain, rival racers and unexpected obstacles to prove he has what it takes.

programme.title: Cats
programme.desc: A cat named Blanket lives in the city with his son, Cape. One day, Cape decides to leave home and embarks on an adventure to find the legendary cat's paradise. To find his son, Blanket must overcome his fear and reconcile with his past.

programme.title: Tall Tales
programme.desc: When his beloved Queen bee Marguerite is kidnapped, vagabond cricket Apollo who has been framed for the crime, teams up with the other bugs to save the Queen and the entire kingdom.

programme.title: Luis and the Aliens
programme.desc: A boy at risk of being sent to boarding school by his Dad - and three aliens stranded due to watching too much TV - must help each other out.

programme.title: Boonie Bears : The Big Shrink
programme.desc: After purchasing a mysterious shrink ray machine, Vick accidentally shrinks Briar, Bramble, and himself. The tiny team must put aside their differences and embark on one big journey to restore their size and their friendship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: In NINJAGO City, Wu, Cole, Kai, Ray, and Misako must infiltrate the Explorer's Club and recover the Storm Amulet before King Kalmaar and his troops.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Prince Kalmaar attacks NINJAGO City to obtain the Storm Amulet, but he runs into an unexpected obstacle: a determined young papergirl.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya learns the history of the Storm Amulet. Meanwhile, Wu, Kai, Cole, Ray, and Misako try to prevent King Kalmaar from escaping the city with the Storm Amulet.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Kalmaar awakens Wojira and sets his sights on the destruction of NINJAGO City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja do all they can to evacuate the city as King Kalmaar's assault on the surface world of Ninjago begins.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: The ninja suffer a defeat at the hands of Wojira, and Nya contemplates a decision that may save her friends and her city... but could spell her own doom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago The Island
programme.desc: Nya leads the ninja against Kalmaar and Wojira in the final battle to save Ninjago City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: A year after Nya's sacrifice, the Ninja reunite to investigate Vengestone smuggling and the appearance of a team of New Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: After rescuing a drowning sailor, Nya meets a fellow water-elemental and comes up with a plan to regain her humanity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja investigate the Vengestone operation but end up fighting each other after a humiliating rescue by the New Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: When the Mayor refuses to release Aspheera from Kryptarium Prison, the Ninja go undercover to free the villain themselves.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja attempt an incognito highspeed heist to retrieve Aspheera's magical staff, but another run-in with the New Ninja exposes their secret.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja ward off the New Ninja to buy time while Aspheera returns Nya to human form, and a new villain plots trouble for NINJAGO.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja are imprisoned, and Lloyd receives a mysterious masked visitor with a cryptic warning from the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja run into an old enemy in prison and attempt to thwart his escape, while Nya finds new hope in an old mech.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Nya, as Samurai X, helps the Ninja escape, but NINJAGO's toughest marshal, Hounddog McBrag, is hot on their trail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: A hopeful singer headed to NINJAGO City helps Kai, Zane and Dareth evade Hounddog McBrag, and Zane learns the value of emotions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja regroup at Twitchy's gas station and escape Hounddog McBrag's capture with a plan to infiltrate the Council of the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Lloyd travels in disguise to a hidden temple where he joins the Council of the Crystal King and learns Kabuki Mask's true identity.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Harumi tells Lloyd how she survived and became the herald of the Crystal King. Lloyd learns her plan for NINJAGO but is powerless to stop her.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja search for Lloyd and walk right into Harumi's trap as Lloyd falls victim to her manipulation.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja search for escape while Master Wu and the others defend the Weapons of Spinjitzu from the Council of the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Nya, as Samurai X, rescues the Ninja, but Harumi's plan for the Weapons of Spinjitzu is already in motion.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Lloyd escapes from the Crystal Temple with the help of an unlikely ally, as both the Crystal King and the Ninja prepare for battle.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja retrieve the Destiny's Bounty and race to rescue Lloyd as he evades capture in the jungle below the Crystal Temple.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja fight back against the Crystal King's army as Lloyd and Master Wu trace a clue back to an unlikely ally.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Lloyd and Master Wu listen to Garmadon's recent journey of self-improvement and find the clue they need in the fight against the Crystal King.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Garmadon trains Lloyd to use the Oni Form, but the Ninja resort to another strategy as the Crystal King's forces reach NINJAGO City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja launch an assault through NINJAGO City in their upgraded vehicles, but the Crystal King unleashes a new source of power to stop them.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Master Wu takes shelter with an unlikely resistance while Nya and Jay escape the wreckage of the Destiny's Bounty with a plan to find help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Pixal takes the broken Zane to Borg Tower for repairs with the help of unlikely allies, and Lloyd shows an old adversary what it means to be a hero.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Kai and Cole avoid capture and bring new hope to the resistance, while Lloyd and Garmadon search for the missing Serpentine.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja reach out to allies across NINJAGO, while at Borg Tower Pixal prepares for the coming battle

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: Racer Seven escorts Cole across NINJAGO City to send for help, and Lloyd gives Garmadon a chance to prove he has changed.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago Crystalized
programme.desc: The Ninja prepare to make their last stand as the crystal army closes in, while Lloyd and Garmadon take the fight to the Crystal King

programme.title: Ninjago Legends: Monstrosity
programme.desc: Kai, the Ninja of Fire, is lost in a Land of Monsters, where he must face a series of vicious and bizarre creatures, if he has any hope of getting home.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Blood Moon
programme.desc: While protecting Ninjago City from daily threats, the Ninja encounters a new elemental master in league with an old enemy.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Spell at the Waterfall
programme.desc: Egalt teaches the Rising Dragon to the ninja; Sora and Riyu learn Spinjitzu from Rontu; Cole reaches the Monastery with the Finders and sets off on an adventure with Zane.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: To Mysterium
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Bonzle travel to Mysterium, only to fall into Dorama's trap; Arin is frustrated with his Spinjitzu training.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Forest of Spirits
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Gandalaria search for a release spell and obtain magical powers. The ninjas rush to the Ritual of the Blood Moon to stop Lord Ras. Kai and Sora disguise themselves as Wolf Mask Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Rising Ninja
programme.desc: The blood moon ritual begins. Ras has everything he needs to free the Forbidden Five. The ninja confronts him and tries to disrupt the ritual; Kai and Bonzle are trapped in the portal, but Lloyd and Arin are there to help.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: While searching for his parents, Arin and the Ninja rescue a baby dragon, uncovering a new mystery and mission for the team.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Enter the City of Temples
programme.desc: When the Ninja are not invited to the Tournament of Sources, they break into the City of Temples to earn their entry.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: They Gather for the Feast
programme.desc: After earning invitations to the Tournament of Sources, the Ninja attend a banquet for Elemental Masters with friendly faces and old enemies, and Lloyd confronts a familiar face from his vision.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Inside the Maze
programme.desc: Arin continues his investigation into the missing Horns but makes time for Frak, who Sora suspects is working for Ras and Nya's first match pits her against Jay, still with no memory of their past.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: United We Fall
programme.desc: In her match against Cinder, Wyldfyre's temper proves a liability in and out of the arena, and in order to stay in the Tournament, the Ninja invoke an ancient rule that requires them to compete in a race outside of Temple City.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Truth and Lies
programme.desc: Arin grapples with Ras's accusation that Master Wu caused the Merge while the Ninja complete the Temple Race and win their way back into the Tournament.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Sword Shatters
programme.desc: Arin follows a lead in his investigation of the missing horns to the Temple City Museum; a tour from Roby reveals a deeper connection between the Tournament and Source Dragons.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Clues and Suspects
programme.desc: Roby and Bleckt visit an injured Lloyd to complete the transfer of Zeatrix's powers as Arin links Bleckt to a clue in his investigation and follows him back to a secret office, where Wyldfyre has an idea to uncover his plans.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Final Game
programme.desc: Arin learns a devastating secret about the Merge and confronts Lloyd as Cole stays behind to protect the dragon horns. Sora faces off against Nokt, and Wyldfyre is too late to stop the manipulation of the games.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Elements of Betrayal
programme.desc: Arin, Zane, and Cole make a shocking discovery in the Monastery of Gates as they defend the Dragon Horns; the depowered Elemental Masters clash with the Wolf Mask army.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja follow a clue to Arin's location but find a new threat, while Nya, Kai and Wyldfyre spark old grudges in their search for Jay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin nurses Ras back to health as they continue his training, meanwhile their trail leads the Ninja into more danger.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin ventures into a dangerous new land to heal Ras while Nya and Kai come up with a plan to make Jay come to them.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Zane's search for Arin leads to an old friend but lands him in the middle of the Forbidden Five's hunt for the Prismatic Blades.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja learn of the Forbidden Five's quest to collect the Prismatic Blades, meanwhile Ras finally leads Arin to his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Sora, Nya and Riyu are summoned to New Djinjago to help a friend, and the mystery bounty hunter receives a new mission.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The mystery bounty hunter tracks Ras and Arin to the World Forest, while the Ninja search for the last Prismatic Blade.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: Arin must choose between Ras and the Ninja as the battle for the Prismatic Blades rages across the World Forest.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: The Ninja hurry to the First Land to stop the Forbidden Five from freeing ThunderFang, and Wyldfyre discovers a drastic cure to Roby's decay.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising
programme.desc: ThunderFang is freed, and only the Ninja stand between the Shatter Dragon of Chaos and his revenge.

programme.title: Everything's Changed

programme.title: Holiday Gift Swap Disaster
programme.desc: While the rest of the group gets creative and makes new, personalized gifts from scratch. In the end, it's a reminder that it's not about the gifts—it's about the thought and effort you put into showing you care.

programme.title: Day Of The Great Devourer
programme.desc: Disaster threatens as the ninja must fight to defeat the all consuming Great Devourer in a desperate attempt to save Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off!The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN!

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: Crocodile Tears
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles are taken prisoners by the Wolves. But Laval is determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue ... but something about ShadoWind isn't quite right.

programme.title: The Monsters and the Mech!
programme.desc: Hudson desperately recruits powerful help to defeat Danny once and for all - in the form of the T-Rex.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Ley-La, Rise of a Music Star
programme.desc: Olly is feeling the intense pressure of their newfound fame, and it's starting to take a toll on him. He's caught up in the glamour and the spotlight, but it's beginning to cloud his judgment and affect his relationships with his friends.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Queen Anne's Revenge: Blackbeard's Shipwreck, and Night of the Mantas
programme.desc: Blue World joins a team of underwater archaeologists on a project to excavate the remains of Blackbeard the Pirate's ship. Then we travel to Hawaii to locate Manta rays that feed in divers' lights at night.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.sub-title: Invasive Species and the Deepest Dive
programme.desc: Blue World travels from Canada to the Caribbean, looking at invasive species and their effect on the environment. Then we explore 1000 feet below the surface in a special submarine that enables us to study an amazing variety of deep sea animals.

programme.title: Blue World
programme.desc: In the series pilot, host Jonathan Bird travels to the Bahamas, where, in the past few years, diver interactions with Tiger sharks have become up close and personal.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: Big changes are in store for PawsAbility as Janice moves her practice north of Toronto. An old friend brings some new visitors for brace fittings, while a former Olympic Sledge Hockey champion and his miniature dachshund get some much needed cart adjustments.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: Janice is being kept busy with a rare case of a dog who uses prosthetics on both front legs. A schnoodle with a ton of allergies and a rescued greyhound also seek help for some recent injuries, while a cart-using Pyrenees mix proves to be one stubborn pup.

programme.title: Adaptable Animals
programme.desc: Janice tackles a tiny challenge: making a prosthetic leg for a Chihuahua. Meanwhile, a squirrel-chasing Lab and an Akita with an autoimmune disorder need custom braces, and a Cavalier King Charles Spaniel returns for a third device.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: Rodents exist everywhere on earth making up over 40% of all mammal species. This episode takes a look at the muroid family of rodents as well as beavers and squirrels.

programme.title: Animal Society
programme.desc: A diverse group of distantly related families and species sharing a few common traits, marine invertebrates include polyps, octopus and jellyfish.

programme.title: William Shatner's Weird Or What?
programme.desc: Three tales of everyday objects that are haunted by the dead, including the story of a man who is attacked in bed by an invisible force.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: A look at the future of mind control, a extinct hobbit race and whether humans can regenerate our limbs.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner
programme.desc: Strange events suggest that aliens are among us: A farmer discovers a cow mysteriously mutilated by unknown forces a Texas man is abducted from his bed and, like thousands of people worldwide, claims he is the subject of extraterrestrial experiment.

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.desc: 150 years ago a strange set of objects are found in the Great Pyramid at Giza. A piece of cedar wood with regular marks etched along its length, a two-pronged bronze hook with two pins sticking into it, and a baseball-sized sphere made of granite.

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: In 1978, UFO enthusiast Paul Bennewitz claims he's intercepted extraterrestrial messages military officials send counter intelligence officer Richard Doty to feed Bennewitz lies questioning whether Doty himself is a pawn in an even bigger scheme.

programme.desc: After clashing with the mayor of Love's son Riley, she impersonates her boss to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Tiny Town
programme.desc: Join the friendly vehicles of Tiny Town as they play games, go on adventures and solve problems together.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner… his mom!

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: LMN's
programme.desc: LMN's - Underwater: Accidentally, Chip and his friends fall into a lake where they are collected by the spacecraft of a sodium atom that carries them to Sodia, an underwater city. There, the atoms of sodium and chlorine live a long conflict. The chlorine wants to join to sodium to form molecules of sodium chloride while sodium atoms prefer to remain. The patrol antimatter comes into contact with chlorine and propose them to provide rifles to dominate the sodium and so force them to molecularized, but Chip makes a fool of the antimatter and makes the chlorine and sodium are no longer enemies and prevails the peace in the underwater world.

programme.title: LMN's
programme.desc: LMN's - The storm: Inside an old wind mill in the midst of a severe storm, Chip and his friends expect it to pass and continue their way. Outside, under the stormy air, the patrol antimatter communicate to Dr. No that they have already found the boy. The evil scientist is confident that this time they will not fail. But when the wind stops, Chip devises a strategy and let the antimatter locked in the mill, as he and the atoms move on.

programme.title: Space Yoghurt
programme.desc: Migol, Popodom and Drod bump into unusual problems in space that they manage to solve in equally unusual ways, but at least everything ends well when you can laugh together. Follow the space creatures on their fun and wacky adventures!

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep
programme.desc: It's countryside chaos as Shaun The Sheep returns to the small screen with his very own series. Peace in the valley turns to mayhem in the meadow as Shaun leads his flock into all sorts of scrapes and scraps, running rings around sheepdog Bitzer when the Farmer's back is turned.

programme.title: Tiny Town
programme.desc: Join the friendly vehicles of Tiny Town as they play games, go on adventures and solve problems together.

programme.title: Roger
programme.desc: The lively adventures of a little girl, the carefree, joyful and occasionally perky Fatou, and an alien, the clumsy Roger, on a tropical island… Throughout their adventures, they trigger small accidents that sometimes grow into major disasters, but (almost) always end on a happy note. In short, Roger and Fatou spend their time saving the island from their own mistakes and blunders.
